item.title: AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 8min The NFL has started onboarding potential replacement officials as the expiration of i
item.description:
Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 8min The NFL has started onboarding potential replacement officials as the expiration of its collective bargaining agreement with the NFL Referees Association approaches, clubs were informed Wednesday in a memo.
More via @SeifertESPN : De espn.com 49 33 152 79 mil

item.title: RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 23min Cita Tom Pelissero @TomPelissero · 31min Former Indiana RB Kaelon Black had 12 pre-draft
item.description:
Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 23min Cita Tom Pelissero @TomPelissero · 31min Former Indiana RB Kaelon Black had 12 pre-draft visits — and the last one was a doozy.
Traveling from Las Vegas last night after visiting the Raiders, Black’s connecting flight was canceled at Chicago O’Hare. So, he slept at the airport, and the Bengals sent an Uber to drive him 16 9 143 116 mil
